creator: admin@valley-internet.com
text:
Kernal panics and shuts down the system with vinvalbuf: flush failed message

Fix: 

Change permissions so users can't delete their log files:)
How-To-Repeat: Every time one of our users deletes the wuftpd log file for their virtual ftp setup it causes this.  There is always a message from wuftpd immediately before the panic that says the xferlog does not exist.
